symptom_description: Vibration analysis indicates severe inner race defect frequencies (BPFI) on motor drive-end bearing with `concerning` harmonics. Suspect binding or restriction here caused elevated current draw on CNV-602.
root_cause: Over-greasing by maintenance personnel caused excessive churning heat and blown grease retainer seals.
action_taken: De-coupled motor, removed bearing end shields, replaced both DE and NDE bearings with C3 clearance ball bearings, and packed with Polyrex EM.
parts_used: SKF 6312-C3 Drive-End Bearing, SKF 6310-C3 NDE Bearing, Polyrex EM Grease (1 Tube)

symptom_description: Vibration analysis indicates severe inner race defect frequencies (BPFI) on motor drive-end bearing with `sharp` harmonics.
root_cause: Shaft voltage discharge (EDM currents) from VFD drive caused fluting and micro-pitting on bearing raceways.
action_taken: Replaced worn bearing set, cleaned grease cavities, installed new grease relief valves, and balanced rotor assembly.
parts_used: Bearing Kit (DE & NDE), Lip Seals, Bearing Housing Gasket

symptom_description: Motor frame temperature exceeding `94`°C measured across cooling fins. RTD sensors indicating winding temp near `145°C` alarm limit.
root_cause: External cooling fan cover grid clogged with lint and debris, blocking cooling airflow across motor frame.
action_taken: Corrected upstream tap settings on transformer to balance phase voltage and deep cleaned motor heat sink fins.

symptom_description: Ops reported strong heat waves radiating from motor frame and `slight` drop in operating speed (`RPM`).
root_cause: Running motor at low RPM (`< 20 Hz`) via VFD without auxiliary blower forced-air cooling.
action_taken: Corrected upstream tap settings on transformer to balance phase voltage and deep cleaned motor heat sink fins.
parts_used: Industrial Degreaser Solvent (2 Cans), Replacement Fan Guard Screws

symptom_description: Thermal overload relay tripped after 3 hours of continuous running. Cooling fan shroud feels severe hot to the touch.
root_cause: External cooling fins heavily caked with thick industrial dust and grease, reducing convective heat transfer by `> 60%`.
action_taken: Cleared blockage from cooling fan intake grid, washed frame fins, and verified balanced supply voltage (`460V` +/- 1%).
parts_used: Cooling Fan Blade Assembly, Shroud Fasteners

symptom_description: Vibration analysis indicates severe inner race defect frequencies (BPFI) on motor drive-end bearing with `severe` harmonics.
root_cause: Over-greasing by maintenance personnel caused excessive churning heat and blown grease retainer seals.
action_taken: Replaced worn bearing set, cleaned grease cavities, installed new grease relief valves, and balanced rotor assembly.
parts_used: DE Ball Bearing, NDE Insulated Bearing, AEGIS Shaft Grounding Ring Kit

symptom_description: Ops reported strong heat waves radiating from motor frame and `sharp` drop in operating speed (`RPM`).
root_cause: External cooling fan cover grid clogged with lint and debris, blocking cooling airflow across motor frame.
action_taken: Installed auxiliary cooling blower unit for low-speed VFD operation and cleaned existing motor frame cooling channels.
parts_used: Industrial Degreaser Solvent (2 Cans), Replacement Fan Guard Screws

symptom_description: Thermal overload relay tripped after 3 hours of continuous running. Cooling fan shroud feels gradual hot to the touch. High load demand from driven equipment (CNV-602) suspected of accelerating component wear.
root_cause: External cooling fins heavily caked with thick industrial dust and grease, reducing convective heat transfer by `> 60%`.
action_taken: Installed auxiliary cooling blower unit for low-speed VFD operation and cleaned existing motor frame cooling channels.
parts_used: Auxiliary Forced-Air Blower Kit 460V, Fan Shroud Mounting Brackets

symptom_description: Ops reported strong heat waves radiating from motor frame and `concerning` drop in operating speed (`RPM`).
root_cause: Voltage unbalance of `3.8%` across supply lines caused `35%` increase in localized rotor/stator heating.
action_taken: Corrected upstream tap settings on transformer to balance phase voltage and deep cleaned motor heat sink fins.
parts_used: Industrial Degreaser Solvent (2 Cans), Replacement Fan Guard Screws

symptom_description: High horizontal vibration measured at motor drive-end (`minor` above ISO 10816 alarm threshold). Unit humming loudly.
root_cause: Uneven accumulation of heavy dried process cake/dirt inside rotor cooling channels and external fan blades.
action_taken: Removed rotor from stator, cleaned debris from cooling slots, checked shaft runout on lathe, and dynamically balanced rotor to G2.5 grade.
parts_used: Rotor Balancing Clip Set, External Cooling Fan

symptom_description: Loud severe whining and hissing sound emanating from motor non-drive end bearing during operation. Suspect binding or restriction here caused elevated current draw on CNV-602.
root_cause: Shaft voltage discharge (EDM currents) from VFD drive caused fluting and micro-pitting on bearing raceways.
action_taken: Replaced drive-end and non-drive-end bearings, installed shaft grounding ring to mitigate VFD bearing currents, and realigned unit.
parts_used: SKF 6312-C3 Drive-End Bearing, SKF 6310-C3 NDE Bearing, Polyrex EM Grease (1 Tube)

symptom_description: 1X RPM radial vibration (`0.24` in/sec RMS) dominant across both motor bearing housings. Vibration amplitude increases with motor speed. Maintenance triggered after unusual process flow/pressure drop noted on primary process unit CNV-602.
root_cause: Slight bending of motor shaft resulting from historical mechanical jam on driven equipment coupling.
action_taken: Removed rotor from stator, cleaned debris from cooling slots, checked shaft runout on lathe, and dynamically balanced rotor to G2.5 grade.
parts_used: Dynamic Balancing Trim Weight Kit, Fan Shroud Fasteners

symptom_description: Thermal overload relay tripped after 3 hours of continuous running. Cooling fan shroud feels distinct hot to the touch.
root_cause: Running motor at low RPM (`< 20 Hz`) via VFD without auxiliary blower forced-air cooling.
action_taken: Cleared blockage from cooling fan intake grid, washed frame fins, and verified balanced supply voltage (`460V` +/- 1%).

symptom_description: Ops reported strong heat waves radiating from motor frame and `sharp` drop in operating speed (`RPM`).
root_cause: External cooling fan cover grid clogged with lint and debris, blocking cooling airflow across motor frame.
action_taken: De-energized motor, removed fan cover, and thoroughly cleaned cooling fins and fan blades using dry compressed air and degreaser.
parts_used: Cooling Fan Blade Assembly, Shroud Fasteners

symptom_description: Motor drive-end bearing housing temperature reaching `104`°C. High frequency acoustic vibration (`0.45` in/sec RMS) detected.
root_cause: Grease dry-out and thermal degradation due to operating in elevated ambient temperature environment (`> 40°C`).
action_taken: Replaced worn bearing set, cleaned grease cavities, installed new grease relief valves, and balanced rotor assembly.
parts_used: SKF Deep Groove Ball Bearing Set, Grease Valve Kit
